meta.title: Making a Killing | Ep. 6: Bill Browder and Maria Snegovaya on Alexei Navalny and Putin’s Kleptocracy
meta.description:
Bill Browder and Maria Snegovaya join Nate Sibley to discuss Alexei Navalny and corruption in Russia. Paul Massaro and Casey Michel look at shell companies and money laundering in Canada.

Subscribe: 

Apple podcasts: https://podcasts.apple.com/us/podcast/making-a-killing/id1551344782
Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/show/0LksXZHMcTGwMk1eV1BsLu
